text:
1. Strong Python proficiency for developing scalable backend services, automation pipelines, and machine learning workflows
2. Experience designing RESTful APIs using FastAPI or Flask with proper authentication, validation, and asynchronous processing
3. Ability to build and optimize data processing pipelines for large CSV, JSON, and relational database workloads
4. Hands-on experience implementing machine learning models including preprocessing, feature engineering, evaluation, and inference deployment
5. Familiarity with vector embeddings, semantic search, or retrieval-based systems for intelligent recommendation or matching applications
6. Strong understanding of SQL database design, query optimization, indexing, and transactional data consistency
7. Experience working in Linux environments with Git-based collaboration, virtual environments, and dependency management
8. Ability to implement structured logging, exception handling, retry mechanisms, and monitoring for production-grade applications
9. Knowledge of scalable software architecture principles including modular design, service separation, and maintainable code organization
10. Experience integrating third-party APIs, handling asynchronous workflows, and optimizing application latency for real-world production systems
